data.name: KycFullTakeover_Desc_Key
data.value: Review and persist AI-extracted KYC profile data section by section.

data.name: aiAnalyticsAudit_Desc
data.value: Bound text field containing the agent-produced JSON payload (typically syg_aianalytics_audit).

data.name: takeoverStatus_Desc
data.value: Bound text field where the PCF persists per-section status, timestamps and payload hashes.

data.name: takeoverLastRunAt_Desc
data.value: Timestamp of the most recent takeover operation across any section.

data.name: takeoverLastError_Desc
data.value: Most recent failure message; cleared on next successful section takeover.
